message:
fix(server): WBQ fallback in cleanup, map_or idiom, flatten dashboard if-let

- cleanup: fall back to synchronous archive write when WBQ is
  unavailable instead of returning an error
- startup_checks: replace .map().unwrap_or() with .map_or() for
  epoch timestamp calculations
- dashboard: flatten nested if-let with let-chains, elide unnecessary
  named lifetime in render_lines_with_columns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
